selected_tasks.body_preview: Ensure every RunStarted event eventually has a matching RunCompleted event in the state database, even when the previous run terminated abnormally (panic, SIGTERM, timeout, CI cancellation). selected_tasks.expected_evidence: Future trajectory reports show `state_run_incomplete_count=0` for sessions after this change. selected_tasks.title: Close state run lifecycle gaps — emit RunCompleted for orphaned runs

selected_tasks.body_preview: Add `exit_code` to the `CommandCompleted` state event payload so that bash command failures (non-zero exit codes) are visible in state evidence, not just in transcripts. selected_tasks.expected_evidence: Future dashboard runs show `transcript_only_failed_tool_count` decreasing as bash failures become visible in state events. The `failed_tool_summary.bash_tool_error` metric in state graphs can be computed from state events rather than requiring transcript parsing.
